titles.title: One Day Jesus Will Call My Name

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Some days drag and some days fly And some days I think of the day I'll die Some days fill me and some days drain And one day Jesus will call my name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: One day Jesus will call my name As days go by, 'hope I don't stay the same. I wanna get so close to Him that it's no big change, On that day that Jesus calls my name!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Most days I pray, but some days I curse. A said number of days I put myself first. But it's not what I do, the cross made that plain. And one day Jesus will call my name!
